spec_match.rationale: Correct horizontal focusgroup implementation on a realistic rich-text formatting toolbar (Bold, Italic, Underline with correct ARIA role patterns).

interactive.rationale: Good keyboard sandbox combining togglable buttons (B, I, U updating aria-pressed state) and a live contenteditable textbox target.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Directly showcases a single tab-stop toolbar with arrow keys, eliminating common tabindex handling boilerplate.

edge_cases.rationale: Tests key inputs and separation grids (role=separator) correctly.

references.rationale: Cites the correct milestones ChromeStatus entry link.

design_system.rationale: Uses standard Stone background, flat shadows, and blue highlight rings on keyboard focus.

summary: The toolbar-demo is a highly realistic, lightweight, accessible application toolbar demonstrating clean horizontal focusgroup integration.
